title: Rahm on rejecting DP World Tour deal
fullText: Media caption, Rahm on rejecting DP World Tour dealTwo-time major winner Jon Rahm explains his reasons for rejecting a DP World Tour deal - which has ramifications for his Ryder Cup eligibility - stating he doesn't agree with the contract the European-based tour is asking players to sign and that he "refuses to play six events".
summary: Jon Rahm explains his reasons for not signing on the dotted line with the DP World Tour late last month.
